headline: Jeff Bezos Built A $1.97 Trillion Empire By Putting Truth Before Comfort—Here's Why He Thinks That's What Separates Great Companies From The Rest
summary: Bezos emphasizes the importance of truth-telling in creating a high-performing company culture. He advocates for honest conversations and challenging assumptions. This approach has led to Amazon's immense success and Bezos' net worth of $209 billion.
